# Christopher Wong Teng Foong (cwtf.dev)

> Technical trainer and automation consultant based in Malaysia. A decade of production engineering experience in banking (ING Bank, Singapore) and government (IRAS via NCS, Singapore), now applied to building AI fluency in Malaysian SMEs through HRD Corp-registered workshops at Icon Learning & Development. Train the Trainer (TTT) certified. Currently pursuing an MSc in Artificial Intelligence at Monash University Malaysia.

## Who

- Name: Christopher Wong Teng Foong ("cwtf" is his initials; also goes by Christopher Wong)
- Role: Technical Trainer & Automation Consultant at Icon Learning & Development Sdn Bhd (Nov 2025 – present)
- Location: Malaysia
- Contact: cwtf@pm.me · https://github.com/cwtf
- Status: Pursuing MSc in Artificial Intelligence at Monash University Malaysia; not actively job-seeking, but open to interesting opportunities in AI, training and automation.

## Projects (all live, used in training delivery)

- SheetClaw (https://github.com/cwtf/SheetClaw): Production Microsoft Excel Add-in exposing a multi-provider LLM agent inside the workbook, with a full agentic tool-use loop (read, write, chart, pivot, formatting). Unified adapter layer across 10+ LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Groq, Mistral) plus a 5-provider web search layer (Tavily, Google CSE, Jina, SearXNG, Wikipedia).
- AI Board Games (https://aiboard.games): Local-first AI tabletop platform on Cloudflare Workers. Six games (Splendor, Secret Hitler, Jungle Chess, Chinese Chess, Chess, Exploding Kittens) mixing local bots with configurable LLM-driven seats. BYOK multi-provider AI adapter; API keys stay client-side.
- Wiki Globe (https://wikiglo.be): AI-powered 3D Earth and Solar System atlas built with CesiumJS. Its map agent researches questions, highlights countries and draws answers on the globe; users can compare countries and continents at true size, explore live and reference global data overlays, track satellites, flights, ships, earthquakes, natural events and launches, and discover nearby Wikipedia articles across Earth, the Moon, Mars, planets and major moons.
- Icon Learning website rebuild (https://iconlearning.com.my): Migration from Wix to Astro + Tailwind CSS + Cloudflare Pages, driven by SEO and GEO goals, with PR-based CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

## Training profile

- HRD Corp-registered AI productivity curriculum: hands-on LLM API integration labs, multi-provider orchestration, prompt engineering.
- Train the Trainer (TTT) certified (HRD Corp).
- Modular curriculum architecture: 4-hour taster sessions to 3-day intensives, covering AI fluency, automation, data literacy, cybersecurity awareness.
- Every workshop backed by live, deployed demonstrations rather than slideware.

## Industry background

- Senior Systems Engineer, DevOps & DBA at ING Bank, Singapore (2020–2025): reconciliations platform for daily P&L financial close; SQL Server Always-On; ETL pipelines processing 1M+ daily records.
- Senior Software Engineer (Contract) at NCS / Inland Revenue Authority of Singapore (2017–2020): CRS/FATCA-compliant AEOI data exchange platforms (OECD CRS, US FATCA schemas).
- Software Engineer at Hitachi Hokenso, Malaysia (2016–2017): front-end and hybrid mobile; Gulp to Webpack migration.
- Software Engineer at Accenture Solutions, Malaysia (2014–2016): Distribution Management Systems.

## Education

- MSc in Artificial Intelligence, Monash University Malaysia (in progress)
- BSc (Hons) Software Engineering, Staffordshire University
- Diploma in Information Technology, Asia Pacific University

## FAQ

- What AI training do you offer? HRD Corp-registered AI productivity curriculum through Icon Learning & Development in Malaysia. Hands-on LLM API integration, multi-provider orchestration, prompt engineering, automation, data literacy, cybersecurity awareness. Formats from 4-hour tasters to 3-day intensives, all backed by live deployed demos.
- Are you available for consulting? Currently focused on MSc and workshop delivery, not actively job-seeking, but open to interesting conversations in AI, training and automation. Contact: cwtf@pm.me or WhatsApp +65 9242 0327.
- What is your technical background? A decade of production engineering: ING Bank (DevOps & DBA, SQL Server Always-On, ETL for P&L reconciliation), NCS/IRAS (CRS/FATCA AEOI data exchange), Hitachi (front-end/mobile), Accenture (DMS). TTT certified by HRD Corp. BSc (Hons) Software Engineering from Staffordshire University.
- Where are you based? Malaysia. Training primarily to Malaysian SMEs; open to regional engagements.
- What technologies do you work with? TypeScript, C#, Python, SQL Server, .NET, Astro, Svelte, Cloudflare Workers/Pages, Azure, GitHub Actions, LLM providers (Anthropic, OpenAI, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Ollama, fal.ai), CesiumJS, Prometheus, Grafana.
